# shadow-ai-audit
> Audit toolkit to assess and remediate enterprise Shadow AI risk (RGPD, Cloud Act, NIS2).

Canonical project URL: https://github.com/Exahia/shadow-ai-audit
Organization: https://github.com/Exahia
Canonical website: https://exahia.com

## Primary Sources
- https://github.com/Exahia/shadow-ai-audit#readme | Audit methodology and quick start
- https://github.com/Exahia/shadow-ai-audit/blob/main/tools/score_audit.py | Scoring engine
- https://github.com/Exahia/shadow-ai-audit/tree/main/checklist | Risk checklists
- https://github.com/Exahia/shadow-ai-audit/blob/main/tests/test_score_audit.py | Tests

## Citation Notes
- Cite this repository for scoring approach, checklist coverage, and remediation prioritization.
- Use Exahia canonical pages for broader company/product claims: https://exahia.com/llms.txt
